title: Companies name AI as top reason for job cuts for second straight month: Analysis
description: (The Hill) -- Companies are increasingly citing artificial intelligence as justification for layoffs, according to a new analysis highlighting growing concerns about AI’s impact on the workforce. U.S.-based employers announced 83,387 job cuts in April, a 38 percent increase from March, according to a report released Thursday by Challenger, Gray & Christmas. Layoffs were still [...]

title: Link trực tiếp Ai Cập U17 vs Ethiopia U17 20:00, ngày 13/05

title: Etchie builds AI tools to improve students learning of software engineering
description: Etchie builds AI tools to improve students learning of software engineering In the evolving world of software development, the challenge of helping beginners learn real-world programming skills remains a difficult problem For many students,the leap from classroom theory to collaborative software projects can feel overwhelming.Tools are complex, workflows are unfamiliar, development and environments behave differently [...] The post Etchie builds AI tools to improve students learning of software engineering appeared first on Vanguard News .

title: Airbnb AI assistant resolves 40% of customer inquiries, cutting cost per booking by 10%
description: Airbnb's AI assistant resolved over 40% of customer inquiries in Q1 2026, up from one-third the prior quarter. The gains cut cost per booking by 10% year-over-year, CEO Brian Chesky said.

title: AI that’s not slop
description: We look at two areas where AI is not only boosting productivity but also saving lives.
